urdu transliteration text:
Ashur ka suraj hai, Qiyamat ki gari hai. Bhayi ka, galaa kat ta, bahan-e dekh rahi hai.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: It is the sun of Ashur, the time of Qiyamat has arrived.The brother's neck is being cut while the sister is watching

urdu transliteration text: Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
A mother's cries are echoing in the battlefield.Oh my Hussain, come into my lap
Maktal me kisi maa ki, sadaa gunj-e rahi hai. Aa e mere husain-e meri god-e me

urdu transliteration text:
Come my son, come into my lap
Aajaa, mere bache, meri aa gosh-e me aajaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Mere liye ay laal-e tu asghar ki tarha he. Godi meri gehwaara hai bistar ki tarha hai.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: To me you are like Asghar,My lap is a cradle, like a bed

urdu transliteration text:
Aa ja mere bache meri aaghosh may aa jaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
In this intense sunlight, my cloak is like a shade.Come my son, come into my lap
Is dhupe me daman mera chadar ki tarha hai.

urdu transliteration text: Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
I am your mother, my heart is not easy in my chest
Me maa hu mera dil, nahi sin-e me sambhalta.

urdu transliteration text:
Nazuk-e ye badan te ra ye jalta huwa sehra.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Your delicate body, and this burning desert

urdu transliteration text:
Aa ja mere bache meri aaghosh may aa jaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
And on top of this, you remained thirsty.Come my son, come into my lap
Or is me sitam ye, na ke tu rehgaya pyaasa.

urdu transliteration text:
May goad may layloon tujhe sinay se lagaa loon
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Let me take you into my lap, hug you to my chest

urdu transliteration text: Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
Let me put you to sleep on my chest, just like Sakina
Sine pe sakina ki tarha tujko sulaalu.Sine me teretir-e me palko se nikalu.

urdu transliteration text:
Sinay ke tere tir may palko se nikalu
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Let me gently remove the arrows from your chest

urdu transliteration text:
Come my son, come into my lap
Aa ja mere bache meri aaghosh may aa jaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
When you would come sleep on my lap,Even to use the hand-mill, I would not move my legs for you
Aakar mere zanu pe jo so jaa te the beta. Chuki ki mushakkat ke bhi pehlu, nahi badlaa.

urdu transliteration text:
Abkese tuje chor-e du maktal me akela.
Aa ja mere bache meri aaghosh may aa jaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How can I leave you alone in the battlefield now?Come my son, come into my lap

urdu transliteration text: Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
You also have children, you are also a father.You also know what the grief of a lost child is
Teri bhi to awlad-e he tu bhi to padar hai. Awlad-e ka gham kya hai ye tujko bi khabar hai.

urdu transliteration text:
Gham bachche ka sehjaye ye kis maa kajigar he.
Aa ja mere bache meri aaghosh may aa jaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Which mother's heart can bear the grief of a lost child?Come my son, come into my lap

urdu transliteration text:
Kyu lait gaya thakke ke tu isejalti zamin par.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Why have you laid down, tired onto this burning ground?

urdu transliteration text:
Ye kiska lahu tun-e malaa ruhe hasi par.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
Whose blood have you rubbed onto your face?Do not sleep on the sand, my beloved, your mother is right here
Mat khakh me peso lal teri maa hai yahi par.

urdu transliteration text:
Come my son, come into my lap
Aa ja mere bache meri aaghosh may aa jaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Jo dil pe tere ghuzri me sub dekh-e rahi thi.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text:
I have seen everything that has hurt your heart.I went with you to carry every dead body
Har lash-e uthane me tere sath-e gayi thi.

urdu transliteration text:
Abbat-e wo kehti tujo bach-e pan me kahi thi.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Now I will say, what I said to you in childhood

urdu transliteration text:
Come my son, come into my lap
Aa ja mere bache meri aaghosh may aa jaa
